title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS FOR THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION, SUBSECTION (a), TITLE E, SECTION ONE, REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2003 / 50 OG No. 8, 4068 (September, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1157, June 17, 1954 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS FOR THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION, SUBSECTION (a), TITLE E, SECTION ONE, REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

a

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1954.
